features.name: Harness scaffold doctor
features.behavior: The generated harness has required shared context, operator roles, team roles, permission policy, and local validator.
features.notes: The scaffold script records the first doctor result in harness/SCAFFOLDING_REPORT.md.

features.name: Bootstrap restart path
features.behavior: A fresh agent can start from repository files, run local harness checks, see current progress, and identify the next unresolved decision without chat history.
features.notes: Project-specific start/test/build commands remain UNKNOWN until planning records them.

features.name: Planning runway and slice gate
features.behavior: Fixed operators confirm the inferred workstream profile, run the planning/design runway, produce candidate slices, and approve one sharp/deep production slice only after upstream gates say it is executable.
features.notes: This feature prevents goal-only scaffolds from locking the wrong first slice before planning, design, or evaluation can invalidate it.
